title: Calcutta HC rejects TMC's plea against exclusion of State employees from vote counting supervisor duty
description: The Calcutta High Court on Thursday dismissed a petition moved by the Trinamool Congress (TMC) against Chief Electoral Officer's decision to deploy only Central government employees as vote counting supervisors for the assembly elections in West Bengal.Justice Krishna Rao rejected TMC's allegation that Central government employees are likely to be susceptible to the suggestion and control of Bharatiya Janata Party (BJP), which is in power at Centre."Only the counting supervisor and the counting
